creator: ninjin@kth.se
text:
Looks fine to me, approved on my part.

On 11 March 2013 05:20, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of emulators/fceu-server,
>
> Please note that PR ports/176820 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/176820

> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
